tagline: Secure VPN setup guides for every device.

home.heroTitle: Set up your VPN in minutes

guides.title: All guides

guide.fallbackNotice: This guide isn't translated yet — showing the English version.

items.a: Yes. Every guide on UltimateGuide is free to read and always will be.

items.q: Do you provide the VPN service itself?
items.a: No. UltimateGuide only teaches you how to configure popular open-source clients. You bring your own server or subscription.
Android, iOS, Windows and more — pick your operating system on the home page to see available guides.

about.title: About UltimateGuide
about.body: UltimateGuide is an independent, community-driven project that publishes clear, trustworthy VPN setup guides. Every guide is written in Markdown, reviewed for accuracy, and statically published so the site stays fast and private.

footer.rights: All guides are provided for educational purposes.
